name: Crafting README.md Files
description: Craft professional README.md files for GitHub open source projects. Generates hero sections, installation instructions, feature tables, and architecture diagrams. Use when creating or revising a README, documenting a CLI tool, library, or open source project, or when user asks about README structure, badges, or project documentation.

references.description: Copy-paste templates for core README sections: Hero, TL;DR, Quick Example, Comparison, Installation, Commands, Architecture, Troubleshooting, Limitations, FAQ
Extended templates for specialized sections: Performance, Security, Data Model, API Reference, Migration, Contributing, Ecosystem, Env Vars, Shell Completion, Release Notes, Acknowledgments
Copy-paste badge markdown for CI, license, version, downloads, package registries, code quality, and social badges
Template for condensed AGENTS.md blurbs that provide AI assistants with scannable CLI tool context
Real-world README examples to study, pattern deep-dives, and progressive disclosure strategies for long READMEs
Copy-paste prompts for README scenarios: full revision, new from scratch, section-specific, audit/improve, and special cases (library, monorepo, migration)
One-page cheatsheet with golden structure, critical rules, section checklist, anti-patterns, and key templates

sources.description: Patterns extracted from revising ms README following xf README model
